custom_site_section_id.description: custom Site Section tag or numeric Site Section ID

profile_id.description: The value should contain a profile name. and NOT a numeric profile ID. This can either include the network ID prefix or with the profile name alone

profile.description: Profile Name - The value should contain a profile name. and NOT a numeric profile ID. This can either include the network ID prefix or with the profile name alone

siteSectionId.description: Custom Site Section tag or numeric Site Section ID

videoAssetId.description: Custom content Video Asset ID. Default: 0

flags.description: Optional flags to include in the ad request

mode.description: Request mode. Valid values are: “on-demand", "live". Default: "on-demand"

adRequestKeyValues.description: An object of ad request key-value pairs. For a full list of supported key value pairs , please refer to [https://hub.freewheel.tv/display/MUG/HTTP+GET+Ad+Request+-+Key+Values]

gdpr_consented_providers.description: List of Consented Providers. A comma-separated list of ids.

tpos.description: Slot time position in seconds. Default: 0

slid.description: Slot custom ID. Any string with valid letters/digits/symbols. Default: "Preroll_1"

slau.description: Specify custom ad unit names for this slot. Multiple ad unit names can be put into this parameter, separated by "\

listeners.description: An object of AdManager event listeners

isMuted.description: Controls if ad playback should start with volume muted. Default: true

showMuteButton.description: Controls if a mute button should be shown during ad playback. Default: false

playerParams.description: An object of AdManager player parameter values

sdkVersion.description: The AdManager sdk version to use for playback. This is only valid for "outstream" formats. Default: "7.10.0"

format.description: The format to use for displaying the ad. Default: outstream

env.description: The AdManager build to use for ad playback. Valid values: "prd", "stg". Default: "prd"
